issues.title: device0815 example lacks introduction
issues.author: chrysn
issues.body:
(From Marco's review)

> [Section 3]
> 
> * Perhaps introduce the device name device0815.example.com before the
> example begins?
> 
> * In the last paragraph, at least some of the text starting from "A
> simplistic client ..." seems to actually refer to the example shown in
> Figure 3 of Section 4.

(Originally https://gitlab.com/chrysn/transport-indication/-/issues/1)
